evals.prompt: 幫我產生一個 Spring Boot DDD 多模組專案，groupId 是 com.acme，artifactId 是 ecommerce，bounded contexts 是 orders 和 catalog。使用 Spring Boot 4.x + JPA + PostgreSQL + JDK 25，Gradle Groovy DSL。
evals.expected_output: 完整的 Gradle 多模組專案 scaffold，包含：settings.gradle（有 includeBuild build-logic）、build-logic/ 目錄下的 convention plugins（java-common-conventions、spring-module-conventions、library-conventions）、gradle/libs.versions.toml、commons/ 共享核心模組、orders/ 和 catalog/ 兩個 bounded context 模組（各含 domain/application/infrastructure 分層）、app/ bootstrap 模組（含 Application.java 和 application.yml）、docker-compose.yml。每個 bounded context 應包含 Aggregate Root、ValueObject record、Domain Event record、Repository interface、UseCase interface、Command record、ApplicationService、JPA entity、PersistenceAdapter、MapStruct mapper、REST controller、Flyway migration SQL、unit test。

assertions.text: settings.gradle 包含 pluginManagement { includeBuild 'build-logic' } 而非 buildSrc
build-logic/settings.gradle 存在
gradle/libs.versions.toml 包含 springBoot、springModulith、flyway、postgresql、mapstruct、testcontainers 版本定義
每個 bounded context 模組包含 domain/model/{Entity}.java 且繼承 AggregateRoot
Entity ID 使用 record 實作（例如 OrderId(UUID value)）
Application layer 有 UseCase interface 和對應 ApplicationService（@Service @Transactional）
Infrastructure 的 JPA entity 與 domain model 分離，透過 MapStruct mapper 轉換
app/src/main/java 下的 Application.java 有 @Modulithic 和 @EnableJpaAuditing 標注
application.yml 包含 spring.threads.virtual.enabled: true
docker-compose.yml 包含 postgres 服務

evals.prompt: I need to scaffold a Spring Boot DDD project with 3 bounded contexts: inventory, shipping, and payments. Group: io.mycompany, artifact: logistics-platform. Use Spring Boot 4.x with Gradle Groovy DSL, JDK 25, PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: Complete Gradle multi-module project for all 3 contexts. Each context should have hexagonal architecture layers (domain, application, infrastructure). The build-logic/ included build should have all 3 convention plugin files. Version catalog should define all necessary dependencies. Each context gets its own Flyway migration file.

assertions.text: settings.gradle lists all 3 bounded context modules: inventory, shipping, payments
All 3 bounded contexts have the full DDD layer structure (domain/application/infrastructure)
Each context has a separate Flyway V1 migration SQL file
Domain events use Java records implementing DomainEvent interface
app/build.gradle depends on all 3 context modules (implementation project(':inventory') etc.)

evals.prompt: 幫我建立一個簡單的 DDD Spring Boot 專案，只有一個 bounded context：user-management。group: tw.com.example，artifact: user-platform。Spring Boot 4 + JDK 25 + PostgreSQL + Gradle Groovy。
evals.expected_output: Single bounded context project with complete scaffold. user-management context with User aggregate root, UserId value object record, UserCreatedEvent record, UserRepository interface, CreateUserCommand record, CreateUserUseCase interface, UserApplicationService, UserJpaEntity, UserPersistenceAdapter, UserMapper, UserController. All Gradle files and YAML config.

assertions.text: User aggregate root exists with factory method create() and registerEvent()
UserId is a record with UUID value field
UserController maps to /api/v1/users endpoint
PersistenceAdapter implements both UserRepository and SaveUserPort
Unit test for User domain (UserTest.java) exists with assertions for domain events
